mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, PRNT_DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, INTL_TEL_NO, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM DEPARTMENT
SELECT JBGR_CD, JBGR_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, DEPT_CD FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_ID, USER_ENPSWD, USER_NAME, USER_ENRRNO, USER_GNDR_CD, USER_BRDT, JOIN_DT, USER_TELNO, USER_EMAIL_ADDR, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR, USER_PROFILE, REG_DATE, MOD_DATE, ENABLE ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userEnpswd}, #{userName}, #{userEnrrno}, #{userGndrCd}, #{userBrdt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{userTelno}, #{userEmailAddr}, #{userZip}, #{userAddr}, #{userDaddr}, #{userProfile}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '1' )
